positive: A highly stylized, central graphic design featuring a whimsical cluster of bioluminescent constellations and celestial flora. The main subject is a crescent moon intertwined with branching, glowing vines and abstract star shapes, forming a clean, elegant silhouette. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau combined with cosmic minimalism. Composition: Symmetrical and impactful, centered on the canvas. Lighting: High contrast, deep indigo and violet background giving way to vibrant electric cyan, emerald green, and gold accents from the bioluminescent elements. Color direction: Limited palette of deep jewel tones and glowing pastels. Print-friendly details: Designed with clear vector lines and solid color areas suitable for screen printing or DTG transfer, maximizing visual punch on a dark garment.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, distracting elements, gradients (too smooth), messy lines, photorealism
